purpose: Hand-checked synthetic fixture (PRD §8: '... the 9 PDB cases AND a hand-checked fixture'). The 9 crystal depositions resolve mostly Stem_I/Stem_II (6/9 are Stem-I-only fragments), so the EXHAUSTIVE precedence-overlap coverage — every material overlap and representative residual precedence pairs — lives here. Coords are 1-based inclusive in a 60-nt local window. Expected strings are authored by hand (simulating the ADR-0004 D1 paint order: paint low->high precedence so the highest-precedence element covering a base wins).

entries.name: synthetic_class_II_all_elements
entries.note: Same extents, class II. Terminator is class-I-only (PMID:25583497), so the standalone terminator tail (47-55) becomes background; the antiterminator (31-45) and the discriminator (43-46, which reads the tRNA NCCA regardless of class) are unaffected. Production paints the shared elements; the class-II-CM-naive run withholds ALL structure (all background).
